meta.title: Theo Bayenet · Front-End Engineer
meta.description: Front-End Engineer with 4+ years of experience building complex SaaS products. Strong front-end architecture, product mindset, available for a full-time position remote or on-site.

home.subtitle: Front-End Engineer
home.description:
Where products become complex,
I design interfaces that remain simple to use.

about.title: Who am I?
about.text1:
🔧 Self-taught, I started coding because building applications fascinated me and nothing was stopping me.
Very quickly, I had the opportunity to grow in a demanding technical environment that accelerated my progress far beyond what I could have achieved alone.
about.text2:
🎯 Four and a half years later, I approach front-end with a product mindset: understanding the domain, anticipating usage, and building interfaces that truly make sense.

These experiences also taught me how to collaborate, understand business challenges, and work with people from very different backgrounds.
about.text3: 🗄️ I’m now expanding into backend development, because understanding the whole system makes you a better contributor at every level.

development.title: Front-End Architecture

precision.description: Conditional rules, multiple states, tenant-based logic

skills.title: Technical Expertise

1.name: React / TypeScript
1.description: Deep expertise in the React ecosystem and TypeScript to build modern, high-performance, and maintainable web applications.

2.name: Angular & Vue
2.description: Strong experience with Angular and Vue for building robust and scalable web applications.

3.name: Scalable component design
3.description: Designing reusable and scalable components for high-performance web applications.

4.name: State management & data flow
4.description: Efficient management of application state and data flow.

1.name: User-centered approach
1.description: Designing digital experiences that meet the real needs and expectations of end users.

2.name: Functional consistency & flows
2.description: Ensuring a smooth and consistent user experience across all features.

3.name: Accurate design implementation
3.description: Strict adherence to design mockups and guidelines to ensure visual consistency.

4.name: Continuous experience improvement
4.description: Constant optimization of user experience through feedback and analysis.

1.name: Shared product vision
1.description: Product consistency: each feature is designed to align with the overall vision and support business goals, with proactive participation in product decisions.

2.name: Feature ownership
2.description: Taking responsibility for features and ensuring their quality and success.

3.name: Mentoring & knowledge sharing
3.description: Supporting teammates and sharing best practices to help the team grow.

4.name: Code reviews & quality standards
4.description: Performing code reviews and maintaining quality standards to ensure maintainable and performant code.

skills.additional-info: <primary>Always learning</primary>, I stay up to date with the latest trends in the front-end ecosystem.
